name: ascendc-development
description: Version-aware Ascend C development, review, documentation, environment, and CANN setup workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, review, document, and diagnose Ascend C software.
interface.longDescription: Develop and review Ascend C kernels with version-matched API guidance, authoritative documentation search, read-only NPU environment diagnostics, and guarded CANN setup workflows.
defaultPrompt: Find the version-matched Ascend C API guidance for this issue.
Review this Ascend C change for correctness and compatibility.
Check this host's CANN and NPU environment.
